issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Batch render personalized videos
scenarios.rationale: Treatment loops over users and calls npx remotion render with --props='{...}' per user, with the component reading props via the registered <Composition>; baseline writes a single render command or uses ffmpeg without Remotion-specific prop passing.

scenarios.name: Animated bar chart with frame-driven animation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment drives bar height via useCurrentFrame() and interpolate() with extrapolateLeft/Right: 'clamp' inside an AbsoluteFill; baseline reaches for CSS transitions or D3 without Remotion's frame model.
